analysis: The project is a website about black holes with a focus on UI improvements. The current state shows that the HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files are incomplete, with pending tasks related to animations, mobile-friendly navigation, and black hole visuals. The theme should be dark and cosmic, with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The website should also include interactive planets and animated slides related to black holes.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.
